---
title: "Investigating Physiological Changes In Humans Induced By Fasting and Refeeding (FastForward Study)"
author: "Megat Nabil Jamaludin bin Megat Faizal"
date: "2026-02-22"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: flatly
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
options(encoding = "UTF-8")
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 18,
  fig.height = 12
)

## =========================
## PACKAGES
## =========================
library(tidyverse)   
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(broom)
library(broom.mixed)
library(kableExtra)
library(knitr)
library(readxl)
library(e1071)
library(car)
library(purrr)

## =========================
## HELPERS
## =========================
first_non_na <- function(x) {
  y <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(y) == 0) NA else y[1]
}

center <- function(x) x - mean(x, na.rm = TRUE) #used for centring 

p_stars <- function(p) {
  case_when(
    is.na(p)        ~ "",
    p < 0.001       ~ "☆☆☆",
    p < 0.01        ~ "☆☆",
    p < 0.05        ~ "☆",
    TRUE            ~ ""
  )
}

fmt_p <- function(p) {
  ifelse(is.na(p), NA_character_, format.pval(p, digits = 2, eps = 1e-300))
}

make_bmi_cat <- function(bmi) {
  case_when(
    is.na(bmi) ~ NA_character_, #dont drop them, helps with structure checks later on 
    bmi < 25 ~ "Normal",
    bmi < 30 ~ "Overweight",
    TRUE ~ "Obese"
  )
}

# same as displaying 1st - 99th percentiles just with some fancy name
winsorize <- function(x, probs = c(0.01, 0.99)) {
  qs <- quantile(x, probs = probs, na.rm = TRUE, type = 7)
  pmin(pmax(x, qs[1]), qs[2])
}

## =========================
## PARAMETERS (KEEP ONLY ONCE)
## =========================
lab_vars <- c(
  "Red Blood Cells (Mio/µl)",
  "Basophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Eosinophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Immature Granulocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "White Blood Cells (Tsd./µl)",
  "Lymphocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Monocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Neutrophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Platelets (Tsd./µl)",
  "ESR (mm/h)",
  "CRP (mg/l)",
  "RDW (%)",
  "Hemoglobin (g/dl)",
  "Hematocrit (%)",
  "Alkaline Phosphatase (U/l)",
  "Ferritin (µg/l)",
  "Serum Glucose (mg/dl)",
  "Insulin (mIU/l)",
  "GPT/ALT (U/l)",
  "GOT/AST (U/l)",
  "Gamma-GT (U/l)",
  "GFR (ml/min)",
  "Uric Acid (mg/dl)",
  "PDW (fl)",
  "P-LCR (%)",
  "MCH (pg)",
  "MCHC (g/dl)",
  "MCV (fl)",
  "Monocytes (%)",
  "Neutrophils (%)",
  "Basophils (%)",
  "Eosinophils (%)",
  "Lymphocytes (%)",
  "Immature Granulocytes (%)",
  "Total Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
  "Triglycerides (mg/dl)",
  "HDL-C (mg/dl)",
  "Non-HDL Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
  "LDL-C (mg/dl)",
  "LDL/HDL Ratio (ratio)",
  "TG/HDL Ratio"
)

markers_lm <- c(
  "Basophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Eosinophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Immature Granulocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "White Blood Cells (Tsd./µl)",
  "Lymphocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Monocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Neutrophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Platelets (Tsd./µl)",
  "ESR (mm/h)",
  "CRP (mg/l)",
  "Ferritin (µg/l)",
  "Serum Glucose (mg/dl)",
  "Insulin (mIU/l)",
  "GFR (ml/min)",
  "Uric Acid (mg/dl)",
  "Total Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
  "Triglycerides (mg/dl)",
  "HDL-C (mg/dl)",
  "Non-HDL Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
  "LDL-C (mg/dl)",
  "LDL/HDL Ratio (ratio)",
  "TG/HDL Ratio",
  "GPT/ALT (U/l)",
  "GOT/AST (U/l)",
  "Gamma-GT (U/l)",
  "Alkaline Phosphatase (U/l)"
)

## =========================
## PARAMETERS (GROUPED)
## =========================
immune_absolute_vars <- c(
  "White Blood Cells (Tsd./µl)†",
  "Neutrophils abs. (Tsd./µl)†",
  "Lymphocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)†",
  "Monocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)†",
  "Eosinophils abs. (Tsd./µl)†",
  "Basophils abs. (Tsd./µl)†",
  "Immature Granulocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)†",
  "Platelets (Tsd./µl)†"
)

immune_percentage_vars <- c(
  "Neutrophils (%)",
  "Lymphocytes (%)",
  "Monocytes (%)",
  "Eosinophils (%)",
  "Basophils (%)",
  "Immature Granulocytes (%)"
)

inflammatory_vars <- c(
  "CRP (mg/l)†",
  "ESR (mm/h)†",
  "Ferritin (µg/l)†"
)

lipid_vars <- c(
  "Total Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
  "LDL-C (mg/dl)",
  "HDL-C (mg/dl)",
  "Non-HDL Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
  "Triglycerides (mg/dl)†"
)

metabolic_vars <- c(
  "Serum Glucose (mg/dl)",
  "Insulin (mIU/l)†",
  "GPT/ALT (U/l)†",
  "GOT/AST (U/l)†",
  "Gamma-GT (U/l)",
  "Alkaline Phosphatase (U/l)",
  "GFR (ml/min)",
  "Uric Acid (mg/dl)"
)

hematology_vars <- c(
  "Red Blood Cells (Mio/µl)",
  "Hemoglobin (g/dl)",
  "Hematocrit (%)",
  "RDW (%)",
  "MCH (pg)",
  "MCHC (g/dl)",
  "MCV (fl)",
  "PDW (fl)",
  "P-LCR (%)"
)

index_vars_needed <- c(
  "Neutrophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Lymphocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Monocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Platelets (Tsd./µl)"
)

## =========================
## PARAMETERS ANALYSIS
## =========================
percent_vars <- lab_vars[grepl("%", lab_vars)]

delta_vars <- c(
  "Red Blood Cells (Mio/µl)",
  "Basophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Eosinophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Immature Granulocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "White Blood Cells (Tsd./µl)",
  "Lymphocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Monocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Neutrophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Platelets (Tsd./µl)",
  "ESR (mm/h)",
  "CRP (mg/l)",
  "Ferritin (µg/l)",
  "Serum Glucose (mg/dl)",
  "Insulin (mIU/l)",
  "GPT/ALT (U/l)",
  "GOT/AST (U/l)",
  "Gamma-GT (U/l)",
  "GFR (ml/min)",
  "Uric Acid (mg/dl)",
  "Alkaline Phosphatase (U/l)",
  "Total Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
  "Triglycerides (mg/dl)",
  "HDL-C (mg/dl)",
  "Non-HDL Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
  "LDL-C (mg/dl)",
  "TG/HDL Ratio",
  "Hemoglobin (g/dl)",
  "MCH (pg)",
  "MCHC (g/dl)",
  "MCV (fl)",
  "PDW (fl)"
)

## =========================
## READ RAW DATA   
## =========================
FF_laboratory_raw <- read_csv2(   
  "FF_laboratory_ETL2.csv",
  locale = locale(encoding = "ISO-8859-1")
)

FF_fasting <- read_csv("FF_fasting_duration_and_FR_duration.csv") %>%
  mutate(study_id = as.character(study_id))

FF_metadata <- read_excel("C:/Users/megbi/Desktop/BA/Cohort descriptions/FF_metadata_0402026.xlsx") %>%
  select(-sex) %>%
  mutate(study_id = as.character(study_id))

FF_diet <- read_csv("FF_dietary_data_28-11-2025.csv") %>%
  mutate(study_id = as.character(study_id))

## =========================
## CLEAN / STANDARDIZE CORE LABS      
## =========================
FF_laboratory <- FF_laboratory_raw %>%
  select(-lab_id, -case_id, -range_values, -birthdate) %>%
  mutate(
    datetime = as.Date(datetime, format = "%d.%m.%Y"),
    study_id = as.character(study_id),
    variable = ifelse(variable == "High-Sensitivity CRP (mg/l)", "CRP (mg/l)", variable), 
    value = case_when(
      variable == "CRP (mg/l)" & str_detect(value, "<0\\.5") ~ as.character(0.5 / sqrt(2)),
      variable == "CRP (mg/l)" & str_detect(value, "<0\\.16") ~ as.character(0.16 / sqrt(2)),
      variable == "CRP (mg/l)" & str_detect(value, "^<") ~ {
        num_val <- as.numeric(str_extract(value, "[0-9.]+"))
        as.character(num_val / sqrt(2))
      },
      TRUE ~ value
    ),
    value = as.numeric(value)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    grepl("^[0-9]+$", study_id),
    timepoint %in% c("T0","T1","T2"),
    variable %in% lab_vars
  ) %>%
  mutate(timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = c("T0","T1","T2")))

## =========================
## CLEAN METADATA (ONE ROW PER SUBJECT)
## =========================
FF_metadata_clean <- FF_metadata %>%
  filter(grepl("^[0-9]+$", study_id)) %>%
  group_by(study_id) %>%
  summarise(
    age = first_non_na(age),
    BMI_baseline = first_non_na(BMI_baseline),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

FF_metadata_clean <- FF_metadata_clean %>%
  mutate(
    age = readr::parse_number(as.character(age)),
    BMI_baseline = readr::parse_number(as.character(BMI_baseline))
  )


## =========================
## CLEAN DIET (ONE ROW PER SUBJECT)
## =========================
diet_lookup <- FF_diet %>%
  group_by(study_id) %>%
  summarise(FR_dietary = first_non_na(FR_dietary), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    FR_dietary = stringr::str_trim(FR_dietary),
    diet_keto = case_when(
      FR_dietary == "KETO" ~ "Keto",
      FR_dietary %in% c("normal", "Diabete Diet") ~ "Non-Keto",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    diet_keto = factor(diet_keto, levels = c("Non-Keto", "Keto"))
  )

## =========================
## MASTER LONG DATASET (everything joined)
## =========================
FF_laboratory_master <- FF_laboratory %>%
  left_join(FF_fasting, by = "study_id") %>%
  left_join(FF_metadata_clean, by = "study_id") %>%
  left_join(diet_lookup %>% select(study_id, diet_keto), by = "study_id")

FF_laboratory_master <- FF_laboratory_master %>%
  mutate(
    age = readr::parse_number(as.character(age)),
    BMI_baseline = readr::parse_number(as.character(BMI_baseline)),
    fasting_duration_measured = readr::parse_number(as.character(fasting_duration_measured)),
    FR_duration = readr::parse_number(as.character(FR_duration)),
    sex = factor(sex, levels = c("F","M"))
  )

## =========================
## ANCOVA DATASET (LONG, baseline-adjusted; EXCLUDES % and optionally excludes TG/HDL)
## =========================
FF_laboratory_clean <- FF_laboratory %>%
  arrange(study_id, variable, timepoint, datetime) %>%
  group_by(study_id, variable, timepoint) %>%
  summarise(
    value = first(value[!is.na(value)]),
    sex = first(sex),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

baseline_df <- FF_laboratory_clean %>%
  filter(timepoint == "T0") %>%
  transmute(study_id, variable, baseline = value)

FF_ancova <- FF_laboratory_clean %>%
  filter(timepoint %in% c("T1","T2")) %>%
  left_join(baseline_df, by = c("study_id","variable")) %>%
  left_join(FF_metadata_clean, by = "study_id") %>%
  mutate(
    timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = c("T1","T2")),
    sex = factor(sex, levels = c("F","M"))
  ) %>%
  filter(!variable %in% percent_vars) %>%
  filter(variable != "TG/HDL Ratio")   # remove ratios from ancova if needed 


# =========================
# Clean long lab dataset for CBC / immune cells only
# (earliest sample per subject x marker x timepoint)
# =========================
immune_cells <- c(
  "Neutrophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Lymphocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Monocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Eosinophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Basophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Immature Granulocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "White Blood Cells (Tsd./µl)",
  "Platelets (Tsd./µl)"
)

labs_long_cells <- FF_laboratory_master %>%
  filter(timepoint %in% c("T0","T1","T2")) %>%
  filter(variable %in% immune_cells) %>%   # <- keeps it strictly CBC markers
  group_by(study_id, variable, timepoint) %>%
  slice_min(datetime, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = c("T0","T1","T2")),
    diet_keto = factor(diet_keto, levels = c("Non-Keto","Keto"))
  )

## metabolic health refeeding ANCOVA 
metabolic_index_vars <- c("HOMA_IR", "TyG", "AIP", "non_HDL", "remnant_chol", "remnant_cholesterol")

immune_index_vars <- c(
  "NLR (ratio)", "PLR (ratio)", "LMR (ratio)", "SII (a.u.)",
  "TG/HDL Ratio", "TG/HDL (ratio)", "TG/HDL (Ratio)"
)

# Anything that looks like an index/ratio 
exclude_regex <- "(\\(Ratio\\))|\\(ratio\\))|(^AIP$)|(^TyG$)|(^HOMA)|(^non_HDL$)|(^remnant)|index"

index_vars_exclude <- c(immune_index_vars, metabolic_index_vars)

refeed_base <- FF_laboratory_master %>%
  filter(timepoint %in% c("T1","T2")) %>%
  group_by(study_id, variable, timepoint) %>%
  slice_min(datetime, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = c("T1","T2")),
    sex       = factor(sex, levels = c("F","M")),
    diet_keto = factor(diet_keto, levels = c("Non-Keto","Keto")),
    FR_duration  = as.numeric(FR_duration),
    age          = as.numeric(age),
    BMI_baseline = as.numeric(BMI_baseline)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !variable %in% percent_vars,
    !variable %in% index_vars_exclude,
    !grepl(exclude_regex, variable, ignore.case = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  select(study_id, variable, timepoint, value, diet_keto, FR_duration, age, sex, BMI_baseline)


# =========================================================
# Shared helper for all heatmaps
# =========================================================
strip_dagger <- function(x) {
  stringr::str_remove(as.character(x), "†$")
}

marker_order_clean <- c(
  # Lipid
  "Total Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
  "LDL-C (mg/dl)",
  "Non-HDL Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
  "HDL-C (mg/dl)",
  "Triglycerides (mg/dl)",

  # Metabolic / Organ
  "Serum Glucose (mg/dl)",
  "Insulin (mIU/l)",
  "GFR (ml/min)",
  "Uric Acid (mg/dl)",
  "Gamma-GT (U/l)",
  "Alkaline Phosphatase (U/l)",
  "GPT/ALT (U/l)",
  "GOT/AST (U/l)",

  # Inflammation & iron
  "CRP (mg/l)",
  "ESR (mm/h)",
  "Ferritin (µg/l)",

  # Circulating immune cells
  "White Blood Cells (Tsd./µl)",
  "Neutrophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Lymphocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Monocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Eosinophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Basophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Immature Granulocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Platelets (Tsd./µl)"
)

assign_domain_from_variable <- function(variable_vec) {
  variable_clean <- strip_dagger(variable_vec)

  case_when(
    variable_clean %in% c(
      "Total Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
      "LDL-C (mg/dl)",
      "Non-HDL Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
      "HDL-C (mg/dl)",
      "Triglycerides (mg/dl)"
    ) ~ "Lipid",

    variable_clean %in% c(
      "Serum Glucose (mg/dl)",
      "Insulin (mIU/l)",
      "GFR (ml/min)",
      "Uric Acid (mg/dl)",
      "Gamma-GT (U/l)",
      "Alkaline Phosphatase (U/l)",
      "GPT/ALT (U/l)",
      "GOT/AST (U/l)"
    ) ~ "Metabolic / Organ",

    variable_clean %in% c(
      "CRP (mg/l)",
      "ESR (mm/h)",
      "Ferritin (µg/l)"
    ) ~ "Inflammation & iron",

    variable_clean %in% c(
      "White Blood Cells (Tsd./µl)",
      "Neutrophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
      "Lymphocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
      "Monocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
      "Eosinophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
      "Basophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
      "Immature Granulocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
      "Platelets (Tsd./µl)"
    ) ~ "Circulating immune cells",

    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )
}

apply_manual_marker_order <- function(df, variable_col = "Variable") {
  var_sym <- rlang::sym(variable_col)

  marker_levels_present <- df %>%
    distinct(!!var_sym) %>%
    mutate(
      Variable_clean = strip_dagger(as.character(!!var_sym)),
      order_id = match(Variable_clean, marker_order_clean)
    ) %>%
    arrange(is.na(order_id), order_id, !!var_sym) %>%
    pull(!!var_sym)

  df %>%
    mutate(
      marker = factor(!!var_sym, levels = rev(marker_levels_present))
    )
}
```

## 0) Cohort description

```{r cohort}
## =========================================================
## TABLE 1. Cohort description
## Main table only: age, sex, BMI, BMI category,
## fasting duration, refeeding duration, diet group
## =========================================================

# one row per subject
cohort_df <- FF_laboratory_master %>%
  group_by(study_id) %>%
  summarise(
    age = first_non_na(age),
    sex = first_non_na(as.character(sex)),
    BMI_baseline = first_non_na(BMI_baseline),
    fasting_duration_measured = first_non_na(fasting_duration_measured),
    FR_duration = first_non_na(FR_duration),
    diet_keto = first_non_na(as.character(diet_keto)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    sex = factor(sex, levels = c("F", "M")),
    diet_keto = factor(diet_keto, levels = c("Non-Keto", "Keto")),
    BMI_cat = factor(
      make_bmi_cat(BMI_baseline),
      levels = c("Normal", "Overweight", "Obese")
    )
  )

# helpers
fmt_num <- function(x, digits = 1) {
  ifelse(is.na(x), NA_character_, format(round(x, digits), nsmall = digits))
}

fmt_mean_sd <- function(x, digits = 1) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste0(fmt_num(mean(x), digits), " ± ", fmt_num(sd(x), digits))
}

fmt_median_iqr <- function(x, digits = 1) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  q <- quantile(x, probs = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75), na.rm = TRUE)
  paste0(
    fmt_num(q[2], digits),
    " [", fmt_num(q[1], digits), ", ", fmt_num(q[3], digits), "]"
  )
}

fmt_n_pct <- function(n, denom, digits = 1) {
  if (is.na(denom) || denom == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste0(n, " (", fmt_num(100 * n / denom, digits), "%)")
}

# denominators
# basically to make sure you dont account for missing subjects
n_total <- nrow(cohort_df)
n_diet_nonmiss <- sum(!is.na(cohort_df$diet_keto))
n_bmi_nonmiss <- sum(!is.na(cohort_df$BMI_cat))

# final table
table1_cohort <- tibble(
  Characteristic = c(
    "Number of subjects",
    "Age (years), mean ± SD",
    "Age (years), median [IQR]",
    "Baseline BMI (kg/m²), mean ± SD",
    "Baseline BMI (kg/m²), median [IQR]",
    "BMI category: Normal, n (%)",
    "BMI category: Overweight, n (%)",
    "BMI category: Obese, n (%)",
    "Fasting duration (days), mean ± SD",
    "Fasting duration (days), median [IQR]",
    "Refeeding duration (days), mean ± SD",
    "Refeeding duration (days), median [IQR]",
    "Female, n (%)",
    "Male, n (%)",
    "Diet: Non-Keto, n (%)",
    "Diet: Keto, n (%)"
  ),
  `Total cohort` = c(
    n_total,
    fmt_mean_sd(cohort_df$age, 1),
    fmt_median_iqr(cohort_df$age, 1),
    fmt_mean_sd(cohort_df$BMI_baseline, 1),
    fmt_median_iqr(cohort_df$BMI_baseline, 1),
    fmt_n_pct(sum(cohort_df$BMI_cat == "Normal", na.rm = TRUE), n_bmi_nonmiss),
    fmt_n_pct(sum(cohort_df$BMI_cat == "Overweight", na.rm = TRUE), n_bmi_nonmiss),
    fmt_n_pct(sum(cohort_df$BMI_cat == "Obese", na.rm = TRUE), n_bmi_nonmiss),
    fmt_mean_sd(cohort_df$fasting_duration_measured, 1),
    fmt_median_iqr(cohort_df$fasting_duration_measured, 1),
    fmt_mean_sd(cohort_df$FR_duration, 1),
    fmt_median_iqr(cohort_df$FR_duration, 1),
    fmt_n_pct(sum(cohort_df$sex == "F", na.rm = TRUE), n_total),
    fmt_n_pct(sum(cohort_df$sex == "M", na.rm = TRUE), n_total),
    fmt_n_pct(sum(cohort_df$diet_keto == "Non-Keto", na.rm = TRUE), n_diet_nonmiss),
    fmt_n_pct(sum(cohort_df$diet_keto == "Keto", na.rm = TRUE), n_diet_nonmiss)
  )
)

table1_cohort %>%
  knitr::kable(
    caption = "Table 1. Cohort characteristics.",
    col.names = c("Characteristic", "Total cohort"),
    align = c("l", "l")
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"),
    full_width = FALSE
  )

# optional save
dir.create("ModelTables", showWarnings = FALSE)
readr::write_csv(table1_cohort, "ModelTables/Table1_cohort_description.csv")
```

## 1) Descriptive Trajectories: Response to Overall Intervention

```{r summary-boxplots (totpop,BMI)}
## =========================
## summary boxplots + median lines for all stratification (distribution) as well as whole pop
## 
## @vivi just to see the changes induced by the intervention, what rebounds, decrease or increases
## significance will be tested later of course
## now we just look at the data at face value and compare with basic biology
## =========================
markers_to_plot <- c(
  immune_absolute_vars,
  immune_percentage_vars,
  inflammatory_vars,
  lipid_vars,
  metabolic_vars,
  hematology_vars
) %>%
  strip_dagger() %>%
  unique()

markers_to_plot <- intersect(markers_to_plot, unique(FF_laboratory_master$variable))

log1p_markers <- c(
  immune_absolute_vars,
  inflammatory_vars
) %>%
  strip_dagger() %>%
  unique()

plot_marker_box_medians <- function(
  data,
  marker,
  use_log1p = FALSE,
  cap_quantiles = c(0.01, 0.99)
) {
  df <- data %>%
    filter(variable == marker, timepoint %in% c("T0", "T1", "T2"), !is.na(value)) %>%
    mutate(
      timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = c("T0", "T1", "T2")),
      BMI_cat = factor(
        make_bmi_cat(BMI_baseline),
        levels = c("Normal", "Overweight", "Obese")
      )
    )

  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)

  # cap per marker
  lo <- quantile(df$value, cap_quantiles[1], na.rm = TRUE)
  hi <- quantile(df$value, cap_quantiles[2], na.rm = TRUE)

  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      value_cap = pmin(pmax(value, lo), hi),
      value_plot = if (use_log1p) log1p(value_cap) else value_cap
    )

  # medians on plotted scale
  med_all <- df %>%
    group_by(timepoint) %>%
    summarise(med = median(value_plot, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(group = "All")

  med_bmi <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(BMI_cat)) %>%
    group_by(timepoint, BMI_cat) %>%
    summarise(med = median(value_plot, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

  # means on capped original scale, then transformed for plotting
  mean_all <- df %>%
    group_by(timepoint) %>%
    summarise(mean_cap = mean(value_cap, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(mean_plot = if (use_log1p) log1p(mean_cap) else mean_cap)

  # n labels
  n_tp <- df %>%
    group_by(timepoint) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(lbl = paste0("n=", n))

  n_bmi <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(BMI_cat)) %>%
    group_by(timepoint, BMI_cat) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(lbl = paste0("n=", n))

  y_top <- max(df$value_plot, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_range <- diff(range(df$value_plot, na.rm = TRUE))
  if (!is.finite(y_range) || y_range == 0) y_range <- 1

  n_tp <- n_tp %>%
  mutate(y = y_top + 0.04 * y_range)  # was 0.10 or 0.15

  bmi_levels <- levels(df$BMI_cat)
  n_bmi <- n_bmi %>%
    mutate(
      bmi_i = match(BMI_cat, bmi_levels),
      y = y_top - (bmi_i - 1) * 0.06 * y_range
    )

  ggplot(df, aes(x = timepoint, y = value_plot)) +
    geom_boxplot(
      outlier.shape = NA,
      width = 0.6,
      alpha = 0.8
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = med_all,
      aes(x = timepoint, y = med, group = group),
      linewidth = 1.2,
      alpha = 1.0,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = med_all,
      aes(x = timepoint, y = med),
      size = 2.4,
      alpha = 1.0,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = mean_all,
      aes(x = timepoint, y = mean_plot),
      shape = 18,
      size = 2.8,
      color = "red",
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = med_bmi,
      aes(x = timepoint, y = med, group = BMI_cat, linetype = BMI_cat),
      linewidth = 0.9,
      alpha = 0.45,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = med_bmi,
      aes(x = timepoint, y = med, group = BMI_cat),
      size = 1.6,
      alpha = 0.45,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_text(
  data = n_tp,
  aes(x = timepoint, y = y, label = lbl),
  inherit.aes = FALSE,
  size = 3,
  fontface = "bold",
  hjust = -0.2,
  nudge_x = 0.1
) +
geom_text(
  data = n_bmi,
  aes(x = timepoint, y = y, label = paste0(BMI_cat, ": ", lbl)),
  inherit.aes = FALSE,
  size = 2.5,
  alpha = 0.75,
  hjust = -0.1,
  nudge_x = 0.1
) +
    labs(
      title = marker,
      x = "Timepoint",
      y = if (use_log1p) "Value (log1p; Winsorised 1st–99th pct)" else "Value (Winsorised 1st–99th pct)",
      linetype = "BMI category"
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = margin(8, 8, 8, 8)
    )
}

dir.create("MarkerPlots_Medians", showWarnings = FALSE)

plots_out <- vector("list", length(markers_to_plot))
names(plots_out) <- markers_to_plot

for (m in markers_to_plot) {
  p <- plot_marker_box_medians(
    FF_laboratory_master,
    marker = m,
    use_log1p = m %in% log1p_markers
  )

  plots_out[[m]] <- p

  if (!is.null(p)) {
    safe_name <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_", m)
    ggsave(
      filename = file.path("MarkerPlots_Medians", paste0("Marker_", safe_name, ".png")),
      plot = p,
      width = 7,
      height = 5,
      dpi = 300
    )
  }
}
```

## 2) Fasting Intervention

```{r fasting-effects}
## =====================================================================
## FASTING ANALYSES (T0 vs T1) - CLEAN TEMPLATE
## - same marker universe + ratio exclusions
## - log-transform selected markers BEFORE modeling (applies to T0 & T1)
## - centers continuous covariates within each marker sample (ALL models)
## - prints LME (timepoint shift), LME (timepoint x fasting duration),
##   ANCOVA (T1 ~ T0 + covariates), ANCOVA + BMI interaction, ANCOVA + Fast interaction
## - FDR computed within each term across markers
## =====================================================================
min_n <- 20

## -------------------------
## 0) Marker lists + log list
## -------------------------
markers_fasting <- markers_lm %>%
  setdiff(c("TG/HDL Ratio", "LDL/HDL Ratio (ratio)"))

markers_log <- c(
  "CRP (mg/l)",
  "Ferritin (µg/l)",
  "Triglycerides (mg/dl)",
  "Insulin (mIU/l)",
  "ESR (mm/h)",
  "GPT/ALT (U/l)",
  "GOT/AST (U/l)",
  "Neutrophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Lymphocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Monocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Eosinophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Basophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Immature Granulocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "White Blood Cells (Tsd./µl)",
  "Platelets (Tsd./µl)"
)

safe_log <- function(x) ifelse(!is.na(x) & x > 0, log(x), NA_real_)

center_in_sample <- function(x) x - mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)

fmt_ci <- function(lo, hi, digits = 3) {
  ifelse(is.na(lo) | is.na(hi), NA_character_,
         paste0("[", round(lo, digits), ", ", round(hi, digits), "]"))
}

## -------------------------
## 1) Term sets (expected)
## -------------------------
terms_lme_time <- c("(Intercept)", "timepointT1", "age_c", "sexM", "BMI_c")

terms_lme_fast <- c(
  "(Intercept)",
  "timepointT1",
  "fast_c",
  "timepointT1:fast_c",
  "age_c",
  "sexM",
  "BMI_c"
)

terms_ancova_main <- c("T0_c", "fast_c", "BMI_c", "age_c", "sexM")

terms_ancova_BMIint <- c("T0_c", "BMI_c", "T0_c:BMI_c", "fast_c", "age_c", "sexM")

terms_ancova_FASTint <- c("T0_c", "fast_c", "T0_c:fast_c", "BMI_c", "age_c", "sexM")

## -------------------------
## 2) Pretty term names + ordering
## -------------------------
term_pretty_fasting <- function(term) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    term == "(Intercept)"      ~ "Intercept",
    term == "timepointT1"      ~ "Timepoint: T1 vs T0",
    term == "fast_c"           ~ "Fasting duration (days), centered",
    term == "timepointT1:fast_c" ~ "Timepoint × fasting duration (Δ per day)",
    term == "T0_c"             ~ "Baseline (T0), centered",
    term == "BMI_c"            ~ "Baseline BMI (kg/m²), centered",
    term == "age_c"            ~ "Age (years), centered",
    term == "sexM"             ~ "Sex: Male (vs Female)",
    term == "T0_c:BMI_c"       ~ "T0 × BMI (baseline dependency differs by BMI)",
    term == "T0_c:fast_c"      ~ "T0 × fasting duration (baseline dependency differs by duration)",
    TRUE ~ term
  )
}

term_order_fasting <- function(term) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    term %in% c("timepointT1:fast_c") ~ 1L,
    term %in% c("timepointT1")        ~ 2L,
    term %in% c("T0_c:BMI_c", "T0_c:fast_c") ~ 3L,
    term %in% c("T0_c")               ~ 4L,
    term %in% c("fast_c")             ~ 5L,
    term %in% c("BMI_c")              ~ 6L,
    term %in% c("age_c")              ~ 7L,
    term %in% c("sexM")               ~ 8L,
    term == "(Intercept)"             ~ 9L,
    TRUE ~ 99L
  )
}

## -------------------------
## 3) Build ONE clean long dataset (T0/T1)
## -------------------------
fasting_long <- FF_laboratory_master %>%
  filter(
    variable %in% markers_fasting,
    timepoint %in% c("T0","T1"),
    !is.na(value)
  ) %>%
  group_by(study_id, variable, timepoint) %>%
  slice_min(datetime, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = c("T0","T1")),
    sex       = factor(sex, levels = c("F","M")),

    age  = readr::parse_number(as.character(age)),
    BMI_baseline = readr::parse_number(as.character(BMI_baseline)),
    fasting_duration_measured = readr::parse_number(as.character(fasting_duration_measured)),

    value = ifelse(variable %in% markers_log, safe_log(value), value),

    Variable = ifelse(variable %in% markers_log, paste0(variable, "†"), variable)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value))

## =====================================================================
## 4.1) Fasting average shift (LME) - ALL TERMS
## Model: value ~ timepoint + age_c + sex + BMI_c + (1|study_id)
## =====================================================================

lme_time_tbl <- fasting_long %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>%
      drop_na(value, timepoint, age, sex, BMI_baseline)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_lme_time,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    df <- df %>%
      mutate(
        age_c = center_in_sample(age),
        BMI_c = center_in_sample(BMI_baseline)
      )

    fit <- lmer(value ~ timepoint + age_c + sex + BMI_c + (1|study_id), data = df)

    broom.mixed::tidy(fit, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_lme_time) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

lme_time_table <- lme_time_tbl %>%
  left_join(fasting_long %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_fasting(term),
    Term_order = term_order_fasting(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = fmt_ci(conf.low, conf.high, digits = 3),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

lme_time_table %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Fasting LME (all fixed effects): value ~ timepoint + centered age + sex + centered BMI + (1|study_id). FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")

dir.create("ModelTables", showWarnings = FALSE)
write_csv(lme_time_table, file.path("ModelTables", "LME_fasting_all_terms_T0T1.csv"))

## =====================================================================
## 4.2) Fasting duration modulation (LME) - ALL TERMS
## Model: value ~ timepoint * fast_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c + (1|study_id)
## =====================================================================

lme_fastmod_tbl <- fasting_long %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>%
      drop_na(value, timepoint, fasting_duration_measured, age, sex, BMI_baseline)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_lme_fast,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    df <- df %>%
      mutate(
        fast_c = center_in_sample(fasting_duration_measured),
        age_c  = center_in_sample(age),
        BMI_c  = center_in_sample(BMI_baseline)
      )

    fit <- lmer(value ~ timepoint * fast_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c + (1|study_id), data = df)

    broom.mixed::tidy(fit, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_lme_fast) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

lme_fastmod_table <- lme_fastmod_tbl %>%
  left_join(fasting_long %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_fasting(term),
    Term_order = term_order_fasting(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = fmt_ci(conf.low, conf.high, digits = 3),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

lme_fastmod_table %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Fasting LME (all fixed effects): value ~ timepoint × centered fasting duration + centered age + sex + centered BMI + (1|study_id). FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")

write_csv(lme_fastmod_table, file.path("ModelTables", "LME_fasting_timepointXfast_all_terms_T0T1.csv"))

## =====================================================================
## 4.3) Fasting ANCOVA (main effects)
## Model: T1 ~ T0_c + fast_c + BMI_c + age_c + sex
## (centering is within marker sample; log already applied in fasting_long)
## =====================================================================

fasting_wide <- fasting_long %>%
  select(study_id, variable, Variable, timepoint, value, fasting_duration_measured, age, sex, BMI_baseline) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = value) %>%
  filter(!is.na(T0), !is.na(T1)) %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  mutate(
    T0_c   = center_in_sample(T0),
    fast_c = center_in_sample(fasting_duration_measured),
    age_c  = center_in_sample(age),
    BMI_c  = center_in_sample(BMI_baseline)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_main_tbl <- fasting_wide %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(T1, T0_c, fast_c, BMI_c, age_c, sex)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_ancova_main,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    fit <- lm(T1 ~ T0_c + fast_c + BMI_c + age_c + sex, data = df)

    broom::tidy(fit, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_ancova_main) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_main_table <- ancova_main_tbl %>%
  left_join(fasting_wide %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_fasting(term),
    Term_order = term_order_fasting(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = fmt_ci(conf.low, conf.high, digits = 3),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

ancova_main_table %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Fasting ANCOVA (per marker): T1 adjusted for centered T0 + centered fasting duration + centered BMI + centered age + sex. FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")

write_csv(ancova_main_table, file.path("ModelTables", "LM_fasting_ANCOVA_main_all_terms_T1onT0.csv"))

## =====================================================================
## 4.4) Fasting ANCOVA + BMI interaction
## Model: T1 ~ T0_c * BMI_c + fast_c + age_c + sex
## =====================================================================

ancova_BMIint_tbl <- fasting_wide %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(T1, T0_c, BMI_c, fast_c, age_c, sex)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_ancova_BMIint,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    fit <- lm(T1 ~ T0_c * BMI_c + fast_c + age_c + sex, data = df)

    broom::tidy(fit, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_ancova_BMIint) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_BMIint_table <- ancova_BMIint_tbl %>%
  left_join(fasting_wide %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_fasting(term),
    Term_order = term_order_fasting(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = fmt_ci(conf.low, conf.high, digits = 3),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

ancova_BMIint_table %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Fasting ANCOVA + BMI interaction (per marker): T1 ~ centered T0 × centered BMI + centered fasting duration + centered age + sex. FDR within term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")

write_csv(ancova_BMIint_table, file.path("ModelTables", "LM_fasting_ANCOVA_T0xBMI_all_terms_T1onT0.csv"))

## =====================================================================
## 4.5) Fasting ANCOVA + fasting duration interaction
## Model: T1 ~ T0_c * fast_c + BMI_c + age_c + sex
## =====================================================================

ancova_FASTint_tbl <- fasting_wide %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(T1, T0_c, fast_c, BMI_c, age_c, sex)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_ancova_FASTint,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    fit <- lm(T1 ~ T0_c * fast_c + BMI_c + age_c + sex, data = df)

    broom::tidy(fit, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_ancova_FASTint) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_FASTint_table <- ancova_FASTint_tbl %>%
  left_join(fasting_wide %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_fasting(term),
    Term_order = term_order_fasting(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = fmt_ci(conf.low, conf.high, digits = 3),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

ancova_FASTint_table %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Fasting ANCOVA + fasting duration interaction (per marker): T1 ~ centered T0 × centered fasting duration + centered BMI + centered age + sex. FDR within term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")

write_csv(ancova_FASTint_table, file.path("ModelTables", "LM_fasting_ANCOVA_T0xFast_all_terms_T1onT0.csv"))
```



## 3) Refeeding Intervention

```{r sats-refeed, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
## =====================================================================
## REFEEDING ANALYSES (T1 vs T2) - FASTING-STYLE TEMPLATE (CLEAN)
## - same marker universe and ratio exclusions as fasting
## - log-transform selected markers BEFORE modeling (applies to T1 & T2)
## - centers continuous covariates within each marker sample
## - shows ALL fixed-effect terms (LMEs)
## - FDR computed within each term across markers
## =====================================================================

min_n <- 20

## -------------------------
## 0) Consistent marker lists
## -------------------------
# Same universe and ratio exclusions as fasting
markers_refeed <- markers_lm %>%
  setdiff(c("TG/HDL Ratio", "LDL/HDL Ratio (ratio)"))

# Same log group as fasting (you already validated positivity in audit)
markers_log <- c(
  "CRP (mg/l)",
  "Ferritin (µg/l)",
  "Triglycerides (mg/dl)",
  "Insulin (mIU/l)",
  "ESR (mm/h)",
  "GPT/ALT (U/l)",
  "GOT/AST (U/l)",
  "Neutrophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Lymphocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Monocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Eosinophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Basophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Immature Granulocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "White Blood Cells (Tsd./µl)",
  "Platelets (Tsd./µl)"
)

safe_log <- function(x) if_else(!is.na(x) & x > 0, log(x), NA_real_)

## -------------------------
## 1) Term sets (expected)
## -------------------------
terms_lme_time <- c("(Intercept)", "timepointT2", "age_c", "sexM", "BMI_c")

terms_lme_fr <- c(
  "(Intercept)",
  "timepointT2",
  "FR_c",
  "timepointT2:FR_c",
  "age_c",
  "sexM",
  "BMI_c"
)

terms_ancova <- c("T1_c", "diet_ketoKeto", "FR_c", "age_c", "sexM", "BMI_c")

## -------------------------
## 2) Pretty terms + ordering
## -------------------------
term_pretty_refeed <- function(term) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    term == "(Intercept)"        ~ "Intercept",
    term == "timepointT2"        ~ "Timepoint: T2 vs T1",
    term == "FR_c"               ~ "Refeeding duration (days), centered",
    term == "timepointT2:FR_c"   ~ "Timepoint × refeeding duration (Δ per day)",
    term == "T1_c"               ~ "End of fasting (T1), centered",
    term == "diet_ketoKeto"      ~ "Diet: Keto (vs Non-Keto)",
    term == "age_c"              ~ "Age (years), centered",
    term == "sexM"               ~ "Sex: Male (vs Female)",
    term == "BMI_c"              ~ "Baseline BMI (kg/m²), centered",
    TRUE ~ term
  )
}

term_order_refeed <- function(term) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    term == "timepointT2:FR_c" ~ 1L,
    term == "timepointT2"      ~ 2L,
    term == "T1_c"             ~ 3L,
    term == "diet_ketoKeto"    ~ 4L,
    term == "FR_c"             ~ 5L,
    term == "BMI_c"            ~ 6L,
    term == "age_c"            ~ 7L,
    term == "sexM"             ~ 8L,
    term == "(Intercept)"      ~ 9L,
    TRUE ~ 99L
  )
}

## -------------------------
## 3) Build ONE clean long dataset (T1/T2)
## -------------------------
refeed_long <- refeed_base %>%
  filter(
    variable %in% markers_refeed,
    timepoint %in% c("T1","T2"),
    !is.na(value)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = c("T1","T2")),
    sex       = factor(sex, levels = c("F","M")),
    diet_keto = factor(diet_keto, levels = c("Non-Keto","Keto")),  # ensures diet_ketoKeto exists

    age          = as.numeric(age),
    BMI_baseline = as.numeric(BMI_baseline),
    FR_duration  = as.numeric(FR_duration),

    # log BEFORE modeling (applies at both timepoints)
    value = if_else(variable %in% markers_log, safe_log(value), value),

    # dagger label for tables
    Variable = if_else(variable %in% markers_log, paste0(variable, "†"), variable)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value))  # drop NA created by safe_log (should be none per your audit)

## =====================================================================
## 8.1) Refeeding average shift (LME) - ALL TERMS
## Model: value ~ timepoint + age_c + sex + BMI_c + (1|study_id)
## =====================================================================

lme_time_tbl <- refeed_long %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(value, timepoint, age, sex, BMI_baseline)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_lme_time,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    # center within marker sample
    df <- df %>%
      mutate(
        age_c = age - mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
        BMI_c = BMI_baseline - mean(BMI_baseline, na.rm = TRUE)
      )

    fit <- lmer(value ~ timepoint + age_c + sex + BMI_c + (1 | study_id), data = df)

    broom.mixed::tidy(fit, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_lme_time) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

lme_time_table <- lme_time_tbl %>%
  left_join(refeed_long %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_refeed(term),
    Term_order = term_order_refeed(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = ifelse(
      is.na(conf.low) | is.na(conf.high),
      NA_character_,
      paste0("[", round(conf.low, 3), ", ", round(conf.high, 3), "]")
    ),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

lme_time_table %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Refeeding LME (all fixed effects): value ~ timepoint + age + sex + BMI + (1|study_id). FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")

dir.create("ModelTables", showWarnings = FALSE)
write_csv(lme_time_table, file.path("ModelTables", "LME_refeed_all_terms_T1T2.csv"))

## =====================================================================
## 8.2) Refeeding duration modulation (LME) - ALL TERMS
## Model: value ~ timepoint * FR_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c + (1|study_id)
## =====================================================================

lme_frmod_tbl <- refeed_long %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(value, timepoint, FR_duration, age, sex, BMI_baseline)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_lme_fr,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    df <- df %>%
      mutate(
        FR_c  = FR_duration  - mean(FR_duration, na.rm = TRUE),
        age_c = age          - mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
        BMI_c = BMI_baseline - mean(BMI_baseline, na.rm = TRUE)
      )

    fit <- lmer(value ~ timepoint * FR_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c + (1 | study_id), data = df)

    broom.mixed::tidy(fit, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_lme_fr) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

lme_frmod_table <- lme_frmod_tbl %>%
  left_join(refeed_long %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_refeed(term),
    Term_order = term_order_refeed(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = ifelse(
      is.na(conf.low) | is.na(conf.high),
      NA_character_,
      paste0("[", round(conf.low, 3), ", ", round(conf.high, 3), "]")
    ),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

lme_frmod_table %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Refeeding LME (all fixed effects): value ~ timepoint * centered FR_duration + age + sex + BMI + (1|study_id). FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")

write_csv(lme_frmod_table, file.path("ModelTables", "LME_refeed_timepointXFR_all_terms_T1T2.csv"))

## =====================================================================
## 8.3) Refeeding ANCOVA (fasting-style)
## Model: T2 ~ T1_c + diet_keto + FR_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c
## - log-transform is applied to BOTH T1 and T2 via refeed_long BEFORE widening
## - centers within marker sample
## - shows ALL terms in term_keep; FDR within term across markers
## =====================================================================

refeed_wide <- refeed_long %>%
  select(study_id, variable, Variable, timepoint, value, diet_keto, FR_duration, age, sex, BMI_baseline) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = value) %>%
  filter(!is.na(T1), !is.na(T2)) %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  mutate(
    T1_c  = T1 - mean(T1, na.rm = TRUE),
    FR_c  = FR_duration - mean(FR_duration, na.rm = TRUE),
    age_c = age - mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    BMI_c = BMI_baseline - mean(BMI_baseline, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_tbl_refeed <- refeed_wide %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(T1_c, T2, diet_keto, FR_c, age_c, sex, BMI_c)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_ancova,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    fit <- lm(T2 ~ T1_c + diet_keto + FR_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c, data = df)

    broom::tidy(fit, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_ancova) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_table_refeed <- ancova_tbl_refeed %>%
  left_join(refeed_wide %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_refeed(term),
    Term_order = term_order_refeed(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = ifelse(
      is.na(conf.low) | is.na(conf.high),
      NA_character_,
      paste0("[", round(conf.low, 3), ", ", round(conf.high, 3), "]")
    ),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

ancova_table_refeed %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Refeeding ANCOVA (per marker): T2 adjusted for centered T1 + diet + centered FR_duration (+ age, sex, BMI). FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")

write_csv(ancova_table_refeed, file.path("ModelTables", "LM_refeed_ANCOVA_centered_all_terms_T2onT1.csv"))

## =====================================================================
## 8.4) Refeeding ANCOVA + Keto interaction
## Model: T2 ~ T1_c * diet_keto + FR_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c
## Question: Does the T1→T2 relationship differ by Keto vs Non-Keto?
## (i.e., baseline dependency differs by diet group)
## =====================================================================

terms_ancova_keto_int <- c(
  "T1_c",
  "diet_ketoKeto",
  "T1_c:diet_ketoKeto",
  "FR_c",
  "age_c",
  "sexM",
  "BMI_c"
)

term_pretty_refeed2 <- function(term) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    term == "T1_c"                 ~ "End of fasting (T1), centered",
    term == "diet_ketoKeto"        ~ "Diet: Keto (vs Non-Keto)",
    term == "T1_c:BMI_c"         ~ "T1 × BMI (baseline dependency differs by BMI)",
    term == "T1_c:diet_ketoKeto"   ~ "T1 × Diet (baseline dependency differs by diet)",
    term == "FR_c"                 ~ "Refeeding duration (days), centered",
    term == "age_c"                ~ "Age (years), centered",
    term == "sexM"                 ~ "Sex: Male (vs Female)",
    term == "BMI_c"                ~ "Baseline BMI (kg/m²), centered",
    term == "(Intercept)"          ~ "Intercept",
    TRUE ~ term
  )
}

term_order_refeed2 <- function(term) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    term == "T1_c:diet_ketoKeto" ~ 1L,
    term == "T1_c:BMI_c"         ~ 1L,   # used in next model too
    term == "T1_c"               ~ 2L,
    term == "diet_ketoKeto"      ~ 3L,
    term == "BMI_c"              ~ 4L,
    term == "FR_c"               ~ 5L,
    term == "age_c"              ~ 6L,
    term == "sexM"               ~ 7L,
    term == "(Intercept)"        ~ 8L,
    TRUE ~ 99L
  )
}

ancova_tbl_refeed_keto_int <- refeed_wide %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(T1_c, T2, diet_keto, FR_c, age_c, sex, BMI_c)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_ancova_keto_int,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    fit <- lm(T2 ~ T1_c * diet_keto + FR_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c, data = df)

    broom::tidy(fit, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_ancova_keto_int) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_table_refeed_keto_int <- ancova_tbl_refeed_keto_int %>%
  left_join(refeed_wide %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_refeed2(term),
    Term_order = term_order_refeed2(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = ifelse(
      is.na(conf.low) | is.na(conf.high),
      NA_character_,
      paste0("[", round(conf.low, 3), ", ", round(conf.high, 3), "]")
    ),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

ancova_table_refeed_keto_int %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Refeeding ANCOVA + diet interaction: T2 ~ T1_c * diet_keto + FR_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c. FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")

write_csv(
  ancova_table_refeed_keto_int,
  file.path("ModelTables", "LM_refeed_ANCOVA_T2onT1_dietInteraction.csv")
)


## =====================================================================
## 8.5) Refeeding ANCOVA + BMI interaction
## Model: T2 ~ T1_c * BMI_c + diet_keto + FR_c + age_c + sex
## Question: Does baseline dependency (T1→T2) differ by BMI?
## =====================================================================

terms_ancova_bmi_int <- c(
  "T1_c",
  "BMI_c",
  "T1_c:BMI_c",
  "diet_ketoKeto",
  "FR_c",
  "age_c",
  "sexM"
)

ancova_tbl_refeed_bmi_int <- refeed_wide %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(T1_c, T2, diet_keto, FR_c, age_c, sex, BMI_c)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_ancova_bmi_int,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    fit <- lm(T2 ~ T1_c * BMI_c + diet_keto + FR_c + age_c + sex, data = df)

    broom::tidy(fit, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_ancova_bmi_int) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_table_refeed_bmi_int <- ancova_tbl_refeed_bmi_int %>%
  left_join(refeed_wide %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_refeed2(term),
    Term_order = term_order_refeed2(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = ifelse(
      is.na(conf.low) | is.na(conf.high),
      NA_character_,
      paste0("[", round(conf.low, 3), ", ", round(conf.high, 3), "]")
    ),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

ancova_table_refeed_bmi_int %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Refeeding ANCOVA + BMI interaction: T2 ~ T1_c * BMI_c + diet_keto + FR_c + age_c + sex. FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")

write_csv(
  ancova_table_refeed_bmi_int,
  file.path("ModelTables", "LM_refeed_ANCOVA_T2onT1_BMIInteraction.csv")
)

## =====================================================================
## 8.6) Refeeding ANCOVA + FR interaction (baseline dependency differs by refeeding duration)
## Model (per marker): T2 ~ T1_c * FR_c + diet_keto + BMI_c + age_c + sex
## - uses refeed_long (already log-transformed for markers_log) BEFORE widening
## - centers within marker sample
## - shows ALL terms; FDR computed within each term across markers
## =====================================================================

# --- terms expected in this model
terms_ancova_FRint <- c(
  "T1_c",
  "FR_c",
  "T1_c:FR_c",
  "diet_ketoKeto",
  "BMI_c",
  "age_c",
  "sexM"
)

# --- pretty names + ordering (add FR interaction)
term_pretty_ancova_FRint <- function(term) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    term == "T1_c"          ~ "End of fasting (T1), centered",
    term == "FR_c"          ~ "Refeeding duration (days), centered",
    term == "T1_c:FR_c"     ~ "T1 × refeeding duration (baseline dependency mod.)",
    term == "diet_ketoKeto" ~ "Diet: Keto (vs Non-Keto)",
    term == "BMI_c"         ~ "Baseline BMI (kg/m²), centered",
    term == "age_c"         ~ "Age (years), centered",
    term == "sexM"          ~ "Sex: Male (vs Female)",
    term == "(Intercept)"   ~ "Intercept",
    TRUE ~ term
  )
}

term_order_ancova_FRint <- function(term) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    term == "T1_c:FR_c"     ~ 1L,
    term == "T1_c"          ~ 2L,
    term == "FR_c"          ~ 3L,
    term == "diet_ketoKeto" ~ 4L,
    term == "BMI_c"         ~ 5L,
    term == "age_c"         ~ 6L,
    term == "sexM"          ~ 7L,
    term == "(Intercept)"   ~ 8L,
    TRUE ~ 99L
  )
}

# --- wide dataset from refeed_long (log already applied there)
refeed_wide_FRint <- refeed_long %>%
  select(study_id, variable, Variable, timepoint, value,
         diet_keto, FR_duration, age, sex, BMI_baseline) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = value) %>%
  filter(!is.na(T1), !is.na(T2)) %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  mutate(
    T1_c  = T1 - mean(T1, na.rm = TRUE),
    FR_c  = FR_duration - mean(FR_duration, na.rm = TRUE),
    age_c = age - mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    BMI_c = BMI_baseline - mean(BMI_baseline, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_tbl_refeed_FRint <- refeed_wide_FRint %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(T2, T1_c, FR_c, diet_keto, BMI_c, age_c, sex)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = c("(Intercept)", terms_ancova_FRint),
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    fit <- lm(T2 ~ T1_c * FR_c + diet_keto + BMI_c + age_c + sex, data = df)

    broom::tidy(fit, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% c("(Intercept)", terms_ancova_FRint)) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_table_refeed_FRint <- ancova_tbl_refeed_FRint %>%
  left_join(refeed_wide_FRint %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_ancova_FRint(term),
    Term_order = term_order_ancova_FRint(term),

    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = ifelse(
      is.na(conf.low) | is.na(conf.high),
      NA_character_,
      paste0("[", round(conf.low, 3), ", ", round(conf.high, 3), "]")
    ),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

ancova_table_refeed_FRint %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Refeeding ANCOVA + FR interaction (per marker): T2 ~ T1_c * FR_c + diet + BMI + age + sex. FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")

write_csv(
  ancova_table_refeed_FRint,
  file.path("ModelTables", "LM_refeed_ANCOVA_T2onT1_T1xFR_centered_all_terms.csv")
)
```

## 4) Heterogeneity and bidirectionality of circulating immune cells

```{r immune-waterfall, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(forcats)
  library(stringr)
})

## ============================================================
## Build wide immune-cell datasets for waterfall plots
## ============================================================

# FASTING: T0 -> T1
cells_fast_wide <- labs_long_cells %>%
  filter(timepoint %in% c("T0", "T1")) %>%
  select(study_id, variable, timepoint, value) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = timepoint,
    values_from = value
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(T0), !is.na(T1)) %>%
  mutate(delta_T1_T0 = T1 - T0)

# REFEEDING: T1 -> T2
cells_refeed_wide <- labs_long_cells %>%
  filter(timepoint %in% c("T1", "T2")) %>%
  select(study_id, variable, timepoint, value) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = timepoint,
    values_from = value
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(T1), !is.na(T2)) %>%
  mutate(delta_T2_T1 = T2 - T1)

## -------------------------
## Pretty facet labels
## -------------------------
clean_cell_label <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_replace_all(" abs\\. \\(Tsd\\./µl\\)", "") %>%
    str_replace_all(" \\(Tsd\\./µl\\)", "") %>%
    str_replace_all("([a-z])([A-Z])", "\\1 \\2") %>%
    str_to_title()
}

marker_order_cells <- c(
  "White Blood Cells (Tsd./µl)",
  "Neutrophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Lymphocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Monocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Eosinophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Basophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Immature Granulocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Platelets (Tsd./µl)"
)

## -------------------------
## Helper: waterfall plot
## -------------------------
plot_waterfall_delta <- function(df_wide, delta_name, y_label) {

  df_long <- df_wide %>%
    select(study_id, variable, all_of(delta_name)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[delta_name]])) %>%
    mutate(
      variable = factor(variable, levels = marker_order_cells),
      variable_label = clean_cell_label(as.character(variable))
    ) %>%
    group_by(variable) %>%
    arrange(.data[[delta_name]], .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(rank_within = row_number()) %>%
    ungroup()

  ggplot(df_long, aes(x = rank_within, y = .data[[delta_name]])) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_col(width = 0.9, alpha = 0.85, fill = "grey45") +
    facet_wrap(~ variable_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
    labs(
      title = NULL,
      x = "Individuals (ordered by change)",
      y = y_label
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.08))) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_text(
        face = "plain",
        margin = margin(t = 12)
      ),
      axis.title.y = element_text(
        face = "plain",
        margin = margin(r = 10)
      ),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey92", color = "black"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
      plot.title = element_blank()
    )
}

## -------------------------
## Make plots
## -------------------------
p_water_fast <- plot_waterfall_delta(
  cells_fast_wide,
  delta_name = "delta_T1_T0",
  y_label = expression(Delta~"Cell Count (Tsd./"*mu*"l, T1 - T0)")
)

p_water_refeed <- plot_waterfall_delta(
  cells_refeed_wide,
  delta_name = "delta_T2_T1",
  y_label = expression(Delta~"Cell Count (Tsd./"*mu*"l, T2 - T1)")
)

print(p_water_fast)
print(p_water_refeed)

dir.create("ResultsFigures", showWarnings = FALSE)

ggsave(
  "ResultsFigures/waterfall_immune_cells_fasting.png",
  p_water_fast,
  width = 10.5,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 600
)

ggsave(
  "ResultsFigures/waterfall_immune_cells_fasting.pdf",
  p_water_fast,
  width = 10.5,
  height = 8
)

ggsave(
  "ResultsFigures/waterfall_immune_cells_refeeding.png",
  p_water_refeed,
  width = 10.5,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 600
)

ggsave(
  "ResultsFigures/waterfall_immune_cells_refeeding.pdf",
  p_water_refeed,
  width = 10.5,
  height = 8
)
```

## 5) Average Phase Shift

```{r lme-heatmap-fasting-refeed-average, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(readr)
  library(scales)
  library(stringr)
})

# ---- paths
base_dir <- "C:/Users/megbi/Desktop/BA/Differential Blood Count Graphs/Master script 2.0/ModelTables"
fast_path   <- file.path(base_dir, "LME_fasting_all_terms_T0T1.csv")
refeed_path <- file.path(base_dir, "LME_refeed_all_terms_T1T2.csv")

fast_tab   <- read_csv(fast_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
refeed_tab <- read_csv(refeed_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# ---- helper: remove dagger for matching only
strip_dagger <- function(x) {
  stringr::str_remove(as.character(x), "†$")
}

# ---- MANUAL marker order (same structure/order you want to reuse later)
marker_order_clean <- c(
  # Lipid
  "Total Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
  "LDL-C (mg/dl)",
  "Non-HDL Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
  "HDL-C (mg/dl)",
  "Triglycerides (mg/dl)",

  # Metabolic / Organ
  "Serum Glucose (mg/dl)",
  "Insulin (mIU/l)",
  "GFR (ml/min)",
  "Uric Acid (mg/dl)",
  "Gamma-GT (U/l)",
  "Alkaline Phosphatase (U/l)",
  "GPT/ALT (U/l)",
  "GOT/AST (U/l)",

  # Inflammation & iron
  "CRP (mg/l)",
  "ESR (mm/h)",
  "Ferritin (µg/l)",

  # Circulating immune cells
  "White Blood Cells (Tsd./µl)",
  "Neutrophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Lymphocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Monocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Eosinophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Basophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Immature Granulocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Platelets (Tsd./µl)"
)

# ---- robust extractor
extract_shift <- function(df, phase_label, term_regex) {
  out <- df %>%
    mutate(Term = as.character(Term)) %>%
    filter(grepl(term_regex, Term)) %>%
    mutate(
      phase = phase_label,
      Estimate = as.numeric(Estimate),
      signif_star = case_when(
        is.na(`Signif.`) ~ "",
        str_trim(as.character(`Signif.`)) == "ns" ~ "",
        TRUE ~ as.character(`Signif.`)
      )
    )

  if (nrow(out) == 0) {
    stop(paste0("No rows matched term_regex='", term_regex, "' for phase='", phase_label, "'."))
  }

  out
}

fast_shift <- extract_shift(fast_tab,   "Fasting",   "T1\\s*vs\\s*T0")
refe_shift <- extract_shift(refeed_tab, "Refeeding", "T2\\s*vs\\s*T1")

lme_shift_all <- bind_rows(fast_shift, refe_shift) %>%
  mutate(
    phase = factor(phase, levels = c("Fasting", "Refeeding")),
    contrast = if_else(phase == "Fasting", "T1 vs T0", "T2 vs T1"),
    contrast = factor(contrast, levels = c("T1 vs T0", "T2 vs T1")),

    Variable_clean = strip_dagger(Variable)
  )

# ---- domain classification using clean labels
domain_order <- c("Lipid", "Metabolic / Organ", "Inflammation & iron", "Circulating immune cells", "Other")

lme_shift_all <- lme_shift_all %>%
  mutate(
    domain = case_when(
      Variable_clean %in% c(
        "Total Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
        "LDL-C (mg/dl)",
        "Non-HDL Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
        "HDL-C (mg/dl)",
        "Triglycerides (mg/dl)"
      ) ~ "Lipid",

      Variable_clean %in% c(
        "Serum Glucose (mg/dl)",
        "Insulin (mIU/l)",
        "GFR (ml/min)",
        "Uric Acid (mg/dl)",
        "Gamma-GT (U/l)",
        "Alkaline Phosphatase (U/l)",
        "GPT/ALT (U/l)",
        "GOT/AST (U/l)"
      ) ~ "Metabolic / Organ",

      Variable_clean %in% c(
        "CRP (mg/l)",
        "ESR (mm/h)",
        "Ferritin (µg/l)"
      ) ~ "Inflammation & iron",

      Variable_clean %in% c(
        "White Blood Cells (Tsd./µl)",
        "Neutrophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
        "Lymphocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
        "Monocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
        "Eosinophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
        "Basophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
        "Immature Granulocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
        "Platelets (Tsd./µl)"
      ) ~ "Circulating immune cells",

      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    domain = factor(domain, levels = domain_order)
  )

# ---- manual marker ordering
marker_levels_present <- lme_shift_all %>%
  distinct(Variable, Variable_clean) %>%
  mutate(order_id = match(Variable_clean, marker_order_clean)) %>%
  arrange(is.na(order_id), order_id, Variable) %>%
  pull(Variable)

lme_shift_all <- lme_shift_all %>%
  mutate(
    marker = factor(Variable, levels = rev(marker_levels_present))
  )

# ---- scaling
lims <- range(lme_shift_all$Estimate, na.rm = TRUE)

signed_sqrt_trans <- scales::trans_new(
  name = "signed_sqrt",
  transform = function(x) sign(x) * sqrt(abs(x)),
  inverse   = function(x) sign(x) * (abs(x)^2)
)

# ---- plot
p_heat2 <- ggplot(lme_shift_all, aes(x = contrast, y = marker, fill = Estimate)) +
  geom_tile(color = "grey92", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_text(aes(label = signif_star), size = 4.7) +
  facet_grid(
    domain ~ phase,
    scales = "free",
    space  = "free_y",
    switch = "y"
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = 0.04)) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE, expand = expansion(mult = 0.04)) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#0f766e",
    mid = "#ddd5c6",
    high = "#f59e0b",
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = lims,
    oob = scales::squish,
    trans = signed_sqrt_trans,
    breaks = c(-23.0, 0, 4.8),
    name = "Estimate"
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0, face = "bold", size = 11),
    strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.5, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.5, "lines"),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

p_heat2

# ---- save
out_dir <- "C:/Users/megbi/Desktop/BA/Differential Blood Count Graphs/Master script 2.0/ResultsFigures"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "heatmap_LME_fasting_vs_refeed_two_columns_fixedOrder.png"),
       p_heat2, width = 10.5, height = 10.5, dpi = 300)

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "heatmap_LME_fasting_vs_refeed_two_columns_fixedOrder.pdf"),
       p_heat2, width = 10.5, height = 10.5)

summary(lme_shift_all$Estimate)
```

## 6) Duration dependence

```{r lme-heatmap-fasting-refeed-dose, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(readr)
  library(stringr)
  library(scales)
})

# ---- paths
base_dir <- "C:/Users/megbi/Desktop/BA/Differential Blood Count Graphs/Master script 2.0/ModelTables"
fast_int_path   <- file.path(base_dir, "LME_fasting_timepointXfast_all_terms_T0T1.csv")
refeed_int_path <- file.path(base_dir, "LME_refeed_timepointXFR_all_terms_T1T2.csv")

fast_int_tab   <- read_csv(fast_int_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
refeed_int_tab <- read_csv(refeed_int_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# ---- helper: remove dagger for matching only
strip_dagger <- function(x) {
  stringr::str_remove(as.character(x), "†$")
}

# ---- manual marker order (same as section 8)
marker_order_clean <- c(
  # Lipid
  "Total Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
  "LDL-C (mg/dl)",
  "Non-HDL Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
  "HDL-C (mg/dl)",
  "Triglycerides (mg/dl)",

  # Metabolic / Organ
  "Serum Glucose (mg/dl)",
  "Insulin (mIU/l)",
  "GFR (ml/min)",
  "Uric Acid (mg/dl)",
  "Gamma-GT (U/l)",
  "Alkaline Phosphatase (U/l)",
  "GPT/ALT (U/l)",
  "GOT/AST (U/l)",

  # Inflammation & iron
  "CRP (mg/l)",
  "ESR (mm/h)",
  "Ferritin (µg/l)",

  # Circulating immune cells
  "White Blood Cells (Tsd./µl)",
  "Neutrophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Lymphocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Monocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Eosinophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Basophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Immature Granulocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Platelets (Tsd./µl)"
)

# ---- helper: domain assignment
assign_domain_from_variable <- function(x) {
  x_clean <- strip_dagger(x)

  case_when(
    x_clean %in% c(
      "Total Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
      "LDL-C (mg/dl)",
      "Non-HDL Cholesterol (mg/dl)",
      "HDL-C (mg/dl)",
      "Triglycerides (mg/dl)"
    ) ~ "Lipid",

    x_clean %in% c(
      "Serum Glucose (mg/dl)",
      "Insulin (mIU/l)",
      "GFR (ml/min)",
      "Uric Acid (mg/dl)",
      "Gamma-GT (U/l)",
      "Alkaline Phosphatase (U/l)",
      "GPT/ALT (U/l)",
      "GOT/AST (U/l)"
    ) ~ "Metabolic / Organ",

    x_clean %in% c(
      "CRP (mg/l)",
      "ESR (mm/h)",
      "Ferritin (µg/l)"
    ) ~ "Inflammation & iron",

    x_clean %in% c(
      "White Blood Cells (Tsd./µl)",
      "Neutrophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
      "Lymphocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
      "Monocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
      "Eosinophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
      "Basophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
      "Immature Granulocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
      "Platelets (Tsd./µl)"
    ) ~ "Circulating immune cells",

    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )
}

# ---- helper: apply manual marker order
apply_manual_marker_order <- function(df, variable_col = "Variable") {
  var_sym <- rlang::sym(variable_col)

  marker_levels_present <- df %>%
    distinct(!!var_sym) %>%
    mutate(
      Variable_clean = strip_dagger(as.character(!!var_sym)),
      order_id = match(Variable_clean, marker_order_clean)
    ) %>%
    arrange(is.na(order_id), order_id, !!var_sym) %>%
    pull(!!var_sym)

  df %>%
    mutate(marker = factor(!!var_sym, levels = rev(marker_levels_present)))
}

# ---- extract interaction term
extract_term_exact <- function(df, phase_label, term_exact, term_regex_fallback = NULL) {

  df2 <- df %>%
    mutate(
      Term = as.character(Term),
      Variable = as.character(Variable),
      Estimate = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Estimate)),
      signif_star = as.character(`Signif.`)
    )

  out <- df2 %>% filter(Term == term_exact)

  if (nrow(out) == 0 && !is.null(term_regex_fallback)) {
    out <- df2 %>%
      filter(str_detect(Term, regex(term_regex_fallback, ignore_case = TRUE)))
  }

  if (nrow(out) == 0) {
    stop(
      paste0(
        "Could not find interaction term for phase='", phase_label, "'.\n",
        "Expected exact Term = '", term_exact, "'.\n",
        "Available Term values are:\n- ",
        paste(unique(df2$Term), collapse = "\n- ")
      )
    )
  }

  out %>% mutate(phase = phase_label)
}

fast_int <- extract_term_exact(
  fast_int_tab,
  phase_label = "Fasting",
  term_exact  = "Timepoint × fasting duration (Δ per day)",
  term_regex_fallback = "timepoint\\s*[×x]\\s*fasting\\s*duration.*(Δ|delta)\\s*per\\s*day"
)

refe_int <- extract_term_exact(
  refeed_int_tab,
```
